February 6 1990 Hammersmith Odeon  London, England

Unknown lineage

05-Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again 
06-Political World 
07-Rainy Day Women # 12 & 35 
08-What Was It You Wanted 
09-Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic) 
10-It's All Over Now, Baby Blue (acoustic) 
11-A Hard Rain's A-Gonna Fall (acoustic) 
12-Song To Woody (acoustic)
